subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! In the Qur'án it is said: "It may be that thy Lord will raise thee to a praised station," and this praised station is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی در قرآن عسی ان یبعثک مقاما محمودا میفرماید و این مقام محمود را
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
